meaning: n.马沙拉白葡萄酒(产于意大利西西里岛)
examples: Recently finished an urban renovation project in Marsala, Italy for an international competition.
One of my happiest memories is playing in Italy for Marsala and Monza, even if I play for Manchester United.
Compared to last year's color - Marsala, a dark, red-brown hue - the pale pink and baby blue shades are much softer and more peaceful.
